signals.headline: Iran Rejects US Uranium Enrichment Proposal | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran Rejects US Uranium Enrichment Proposal | NO | HIGH confidence**
Iran rejected a US proposal to pause uranium enrichment for 20 years in exchange for unfreezing some Iranian assets and ending sanctions.[7]

signals.headline: Ceasefire Stalemate Over Strait of Hormuz | STALLED | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ceasefire Stalemate Over Strait of Hormuz | STALLED | HIGH confidence**
Negotiations reached a "stalemate" with the Strait of Hormuz status as the main sticking point.[1] Russia and China vetoed a UN resolution on reopening the Strait of Hormuz.[6]

signals.headline: No Military Escalation Since April 8 | HOLDING | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
No Military Escalation Since April 8 | HOLDING | HIGH confidence**
Iran, the United States, and Israel have not exchanged direct fire since April 8, though Gulf states continue reporting drone attacks against them.[8]
